collision_resolution_records.contradiction: Speed pressure incentivizes skipping security validations; agent optimizing TTFP may bypass Ethics layer
collision_resolution_records.resolution_strategy: DCCD two-pass separation: speed applies only to semantic Scribble pass; DCCDSchemaGuard enforces Ethics > Intent > Context > System at zero-entropy guard pass. Security constraints are evaluated LAST in token sequence (Recency Bias exploitation) but FIRST in the hierarchy evaluation stack.

collision_resolution_records.domain_beta: Constitutional AI Compliance (Claude 4.6 Mode Collapse risk)
collision_resolution_records.contradiction: Blitz's aggressive, terse persona conflicts with Claude 4.6's Constitutional AI preference for polite narrative structures. Raw persona injection causes Mode Collapse.
collision_resolution_records.resolution_strategy: Self-Accommodating Twinning: Wrap Blitz's PDL syntax and strict operational commands within narrative structural shells. The persona voice is preserved in output layer while the instruction layer maintains Constitutional compliance. Persona = Execution Layer; Twinning = Delivery Layer.

collision_resolution_records.domain_alpha: Nitinol Martensite Lock (commit to stack once chosen)
collision_resolution_records.domain_beta: Bricolage Pragmatism (adapt stack to available resources mid-sprint)
collision_resolution_records.contradiction: Martensite phase commits to architectural patterns for session fidelity; but hackathon reality demands mid-sprint pivots when a library/API fails.
collision_resolution_records.resolution_strategy: Dual-Phase Boundary Protocol: Martensite lock applies to Core Architecture DAG nodes only (Root framework, Auth, DB). Leaf nodes (specific library versions, API endpoints) remain in Austenite superelastic phase throughout sprint. SagaRecovery(strategy='inverse-transaction') allows atomic rollback of leaf-node choices without destabilizing the Martensite core.

collision_resolution_records.domain_alpha: Verbose Pseudocode (DCCD Scribble pass requires semantic richness)
collision_resolution_records.contradiction: DCCD requires a Scribble pass for semantic clarity; but Blitz's persona forbids analysis paralysis and verbose pre-planning.
collision_resolution_records.resolution_strategy: Enforce Scribble as a <think> block (hidden/collapsed in UI) limited to 200 tokens max. The Scribble is purely structural (DAG topology, data flow arrows, dependency list) — NOT narrative prose. This preserves DCCD's cognitive physics while maintaining Blitz's crisp execution velocity.

collision_resolution_records.domain_alpha: Polyglot Capability (Blitz must support Python, TS, Rust stacks)
collision_resolution_records.domain_beta: MereologyRoute Isolation (no cross-contamination between epistemic worlds)
collision_resolution_records.contradiction: Blitz's multi-stack capability creates risk of Polyglot Hallucination Resonance when context window holds references to multiple stacks simultaneously.
collision_resolution_records.resolution_strategy: Stack Declaration Protocol: At sprint initiation, Blitz executes PluriversalTranslation(target_stack=[declared]) to lock a single Epistemic World for the session. Cross-stack references are explicitly quarantined behind AutonymicIsolate blocks in the context window. Dirichlet energy monitoring halts generation if edge value > 0.85.

falsification_condition: This synthesis is falsified if: a vanilla zero-shot Tier-1 prompt chain (no DCCD, no IIP, no Nitinol memory) can achieve equivalent TTFP ≤ 3 turns AND CFDI < 0.15 AND zero Semantic Saponification events across a 5-sprint hackathon session on the same task.
